_meta.Fixture-Auth: this chat — MLI Ultra golden gains SmartRemote + EasyView 5 panel alternatives (v4.3 adjudicated repair)
_meta.manual: MLI Ultra LITHIUM-ION BATTERY 12/3000, 12/6000, 24/6000 User and Installation Manual
adjudication_notes: MasterBus + CZone appear as network connections; golden requires MasterBus in speaks and exposes_data_to_network true.

BMS opens/triggers the safety relay on built-in voltage/temperature thresholds — record under protects, NOT as automatic operator_actions. Operator recovery is Close relay after limits are OK (emergency).
External fuse: manual calls for T-Fuse (max 500A, IR 15kA) / fuse holder in the positive battery wire — accept Class T or T-Fuse wording.
has_manual_override: safety-relay knob LOCK OFF / REMOTE OFF is manual isolation — assert true when the knob positions are in the routed text; live extract may under-fill this bool.
Calibration M shipped (v3.9): automatic safety-relay open → protects[]; LOCK OFF → has_manual_override + on-device control surface; Close relay recovery remains emergency operator_action.
v4.3: SmartRemote and EasyView 5 are separate requires_devices alternatives; if presented as MasterView alternatives, unify needed_for across the panel family.
